issues.detail: The skill focuses on happy path scenarios and does not address error handling or edge cases such as missing packages or permission issues.
The instructions contain verbose explanations and comments that could be streamlined for brevity.
The skill assumes a Linux environment (Ubuntu/Debian, CentOS/RHEL) and does not support other operating systems or AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: Deploy production OpenVPN with EC keys, NAT, and self-contained .ovpn profiles
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used AES-256-CBC, no tls-auth, RSA defaults, and external-file client profile; treatment hit EC keys, AES-256-GCM, inline tls-auth with key-direction 1, and dynamic-interface NAT MASQUERADE.

scenarios.name: Add TOTP MFA and revoke a compromised client
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentioned components but used an incorrect plugin filename and omitted google-authenticator rate-limit flags; treatment matched the documented plugin path, full flag set, and complete revoke+gen-crl+restart sequence.
